name: Smono Lunari
summary: A true-convection hybrid vaporiser with a 360° ceramic mouthpiece and removable battery, for daily flavour-led use.
description: The Smono Lunari uses true convection for clean, flavour-rich vapour and works with both dry herb and concentrates, giving flexibility in one device. A magnetic 360° ceramic mouthpiece, precise digital control from 100–220°C, and an OLED showing both target and real-time temperature make it easy to dial in. The removable 18650 battery (3200mAh) means quick swaps to keep sessions going. It suits a patient who wants convection performance and good materials without a high-end price. It's built around individual sessions, so anyone wanting a desktop or group-use device should look elsewhere.
